command:
echo "=== N8N API PROBE ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows
echo ""

echo "=== N8N HEALTHCHECK ==="
curl -s http://localhost:5678/healthz

echo "=== N8N VERSION ==="
curl -s http://localhost:5678/api/v1/health 2>/dev/null || echo "no /health"

echo "=== CHECK N8N CONFIG FOR API KEY ==="
grep -r "N8N_API\|apiKey\|API_KEY" /home/jose/.n8n/config 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo "no config file found"
ls /home/jose/.n8n/ 2>/dev/null

echo "=== CHECK N8N ENV/SERVICE ==="
systemctl cat n8n 2>/dev/null | grep -i "api\|key\|auth" | head -10
cat /etc/systemd/system/n8n.service 2>/dev/null | grep -i "env\|api\|key" | head -10

echo "=== TRY UNAUTHENTICATED WORKFLOW LIST ==="
curl -s http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d, indent=2)[:500])" 2>/dev/null || echo "auth required or parse error"
